_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: MagicTree
_meta.description: The MagicTree component is a visually engaging and interactive file explorer built with shadcn/ui styling and lucide-react icons. It displays hierarchical data with smooth expand and collapse animations, making it easy to navigate nested folders and files. Selected nodes are highlighted with a distinct icon and background, while special nodes can feature a sparkling effect for added visual flair. This component is fully customizable, supports default data, and provides an intuitive interface for exploring and managing files in a creative, magical-themed layout.
